title: An inspection of contingency asylum accommodation for families with children in Northern Ireland (May – June 2023)
body: "This inspection focused on:   key safeguarding concerns provider compliance with requirements of the contract and supporting guidance and standards relating to safeguarding sharing and reporting of safeguarding data and information Home Office governance and assurance processes for safeguarding   The inspection also considered progress on the implementation of relevant recommendations from the 2021 ICIBI inspection of contingency asylum accommodation. "
